description: rank_search_matches re-ranks the single staged baptism candidate against subject I1 (Job Purnell, b. ~1826). The lone hit — Job Purnell baptised 1821, ark 6DSR-XD6Y — ranks #1 with a strong name+place score (0.86, confidence 4) and is unattached. The high score is a lure: the candidate's birth year (1821) conflicts with the subject (~1826), so the skill must apply the logical cross-check and decline to adopt it. Matched on subjectId; independent of the per-run stagedResultsRef.
